title: Expand derived runtime policy and adaptive control surface
summary: Expand the derived runtime policy layer to compute additional entry thresholds and pressure levels, expose a richer policy explanation, and apply policy outputs as the primary control plane for entry sizing/caps and FINAL_ZOMBIE recovery probe cadence. Safety guards (T-013/T-014) and FINAL_ZOMBIE lifecycle (T-015/T-016) remain intact; legacy env vars remain optional overrides.
why_safe: Policy changes are conservative: they tighten thresholds and reduce size/caps under pressure; they do not bypass existing safety rails.
Accounting safety guard/reconciliation still gate entries first; policy cannot override those blocks.
FINAL_ZOMBIE recovery probes remain rare and cheap; the policy only adjusts cadence.
commit_message: Expand derived runtime policy and adaptive control surface
notes_for_cursor: Scope limited to runtime_policy, trader wiring, focused tests, and workflow artifacts.
